overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a winding suburban street in a wealthy hillside neighborhood. The character passes luxury Mediterranean-style homes and various sports cars while walking on sidewalks and crossing roads on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale suburban sidewalk next to retaining wall

events.description: blue luxury sedan passes by on the right side of the road
red convertible sports car drives past on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a beige retaining wall, approaching a large Mediterranean villa

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving uphill along the suburban road

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running parallel to the sidewalk with utility boxes attached
large two-story house with arched openings, balconies, and terracotta roof tiles
steep hillside with exposed rock faces and scattered trees
grey metal electrical utility box on the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a tall beige retaining wall, approaching a large Mediterranean-style villa. The road curves through a hilly suburban neighborhood with moderate traffic of luxury sports cars passing by.

events.description: passing the Mediterranean villa and approaching a street intersection
white sedan and black SUV approach the intersection from the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the villa, approaching the intersection to cross the street

notable_agents.action: white sedan slowing down at the intersection crosswalk

entered.detail: blue construction fencing surrounding a building site across the street
contemporary white two-story house with dark tinted windows

segments.scene_description: The character passes the Mediterranean villa and approaches a street intersection. A construction site with blue barriers becomes visible across the street, while luxury vehicles approach and stop at the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing suburban street with landscaped front yards

events.description: character steps off the curb and begins crossing the street
teal sports car passes by on the left while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street from one sidewalk to the other, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: teal sports car driving downhill past the crossing pedestrian

entered.detail: well-maintained grassy front yards with flowering plants and shrubs
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the suburban street, moving from the retaining wall side to the landscaped lawn side. Various sports cars pass by as the character navigates the crosswalk, with palm trees and modern houses visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: estate sidewalk with stone walls and wooden gates

events.description: walking past large stone pillars and wooden gates of a private estate

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past an upscale gated estate with stone walls and mature tree canopy

entered.detail: grey stone pillars supporting wooden driveway gates
large wooden estate gates with metal hardware between stone pillars
large luxury house visible behind stone walls and manicured hedges
large oak trees with dense canopies overhanging the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks past an exclusive gated estate with stone pillars and wooden gates. Large mature trees create partial shade over the sidewalk, and a luxury home is visible behind the estate walls. The suburban street continues winding through the hillside neighborhood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding hillside road that transitions from a walled residential stretch to an exclusive gated estate. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a tall beige retaining wall, passing a large Mediterranean-style villa as luxury sports cars navigate the curving street. As the character approaches a street intersection, the view opens to reveal a construction site with blue barriers across the road where vehicles pause at the crosswalk. The scene then shifts as the character crosses the street, moving from the retaining wall toward landscaped lawns and palm trees under the bright sun. Finally, the camera follows the character past an exclusive gated estate with stone pillars and wooden gates, moving into the partial shade of mature trees that line the continuing suburban road.
